    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages

    I

    INVALID_MOVE - Enum constant in enum class core.MoveResult.Status
    The move is not allowed by the piece's movement rules.
    isAlive() - Method in class pieces.Warrior
    Checks if the Warrior is still alive.
    isEmpty(Position) - Method in class core.Board
    Checks whether a board position is empty.
    isEmpty(Position, Board) - Method in class core.Piece
    Checks if a given position on the board is currently empty.
    isEnemy(Position, Board) - Method in class core.Piece
    Checks if a given position is occupied by an enemy piece.
    isGameOver() - Method in class core.GameEngine
    Checks if the game has concluded.
    isSuccess() - Method in class core.MoveResult
    Checks if the move was successful.
    isValid() - Method in class core.Position
    Determines whether the position falls within the boundaries of an 8x8 board.
    isWon() - Method in class core.MoveResult
    Checks if this move resulted in winning the game.
